# widgets/dist

Built widget files, ready for deployment. These are generated by `npm run build:widgets` — do not edit directly.

## Files

| File | Size | Description |
|------|------|-------------|
| `playbook-widgets.js` | ~19 KB | Combined IIFE bundle containing all 3 widgets |
| `playbook-helpline.js` | ~4 KB | Standalone helpline component |
| `playbook-myth.js` | ~6 KB | Standalone myth card component |
| `playbook-odds.js` | ~9 KB | Standalone odds card component |

## Usage

Use the combined bundle to load all widgets at once:

```html
<script src="playbook-widgets.js"></script>
```

Or load individual components to reduce payload:

```html
<script src="playbook-helpline.js"></script>
```

## Rebuilding

```bash
npm run build:widgets
```

Source files are in [`widgets/src/`](../src/).
